reviews.review_description: Overall it is a good game. It would be great if it had gun stock support. Maybe more shotguns.
Good game but needs improvement on reloading as sometime only one bullet can be seen in the chamber but still fires two shots

It would be a great upgrade to be able to use it with The Real Stock Pro or MegaVR Sim Stock, or even the possibility of using a Bluetooth button for shooting. Currently, it's quite inconvenient to have to keep using the left stick to "load" each round, even with voice commands to release targets and automatic ammo loading, the command is necessary.

It's a great game, and thank you for the game. It's missing some essential features for clay target shooting practice. I'd like a feature to help me evaluate my shots. I'd like support for gun stocks like the Real Stock Pro, offset controllers like the GAIM and K-Trigger, and Bluetooth trigger switches. It would be nice if there were automation and voice control options for controls other than aiming and shooting. Most of this is implemented in Clay Hunt VR. Players want to get as close as possible to shooting with their own guns.

Very good simulation of shooting clays. It was a bit hard to see the clays until I turned off the aim assist options which were obscuring them. With the aim assists off I have no problem seeing the clays and the game is transformed for the better. Good variety of different shooting games. Very happy I bought this and at the price it's easy to recommend.
I like how you can modify your shotgun
Its ok but to hard too see clays in vr
